scripts.build: yarn build:sol && yarn build:ts && yarn build:cannon
scripts.cannon:publish: yarn cannon publish cow-settlement --chain-id 13370 --registry-chain-id 10 && yarn cannon:record
scripts.cannon:record: CANNON_REGISTRY_PRIORITY=local yarn cannon inspect cow-settlement:latest --chain-id 13370 --out deploy-json > cannon/deploy.json && CANNON_REGISTRY_PRIORITY=local yarn cannon inspect cow-settlement:latest --chain-id 13370 --out misc-json > cannon/misc.json
